name: ChkStart_LINReconfRequestFormatViolation
title: ChkStart_LINReconfRequestFormatViolation
description: Checks the format of LIN reconfiguration requests.
An event will be generated, if in a detected reconfiguration request at least one Slave attribute is violated.

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
